title: Assembly Stats with MetaQuast
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"63p01","text":"Calculate various assembly statistics using the MetaQuast app on the CyVerse Discovery Environment.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Click "Sign Up" to create an account.
After account creation go back to https://user.cyverse.org/ and login with your account. https://user.cyverse.org/
Click the "Data" button found on the left. Navigate to your user folder. a 5

Upload your final.contigs.fa file generated from Megahit. Important: You must scp your contigs to your local machine before you can upload. $ scp username@sftp.hpc.arizona.edu:/rsgrps/bh_class/username/assembly/megahit-out/final.contigs.fa .
Once your upload is complete, click on the "Apps" button found on the left. a
Search for "MetaQuast". Click on MetaQuast-4.3 (denovo based) a
Under the "Fasta file(s)" tab, select the newly uploaded final.contigs.fa file. This is the only parameter that needs to change. Click "Launch Analysis".
Once MetaQuast is complete (email notification), navigate to the output found in the "analyses" folder in your data storage.
Download the "report.html" file found in the MegaQuast output folder.
Open the report.html file to see a summary of assembly statistics.
creator: James E Thornton Jr
